name: Robert Pete Williams
abstract: Robert Pete Williams (March 14, 1914 – December 31, 1980) was an American Louisiana blues musician. His music characteristically employed unconventional structures and guitar tunings, and his songs are often about the time he served in prison.

interviews.title: Butch Cage and Robert Pete Williams Interview, 1967-05-13

about_quotes.speaker: Matthew Maxey
about_quotes.evidence: Well that was all made by me With Hogman Maxie Guitar Wells Robert Pete Williams So that made a Well us three made that record of it
